name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence-typegraph
description: Optional TypeGraph storage, history, and provenance adapter for the Lachesis evidence runtime
author: Nicia AI

scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "const root = await import('@nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence-typegraph'); const sqlite = await import('@nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence-typegraph/sqlite'); if (typeof root.createTypeGraphEvidenceRepository !== 'function' || typeof root.createM5TypeGraphEvidenceStore !== 'function' || typeof sqlite.createTypeGraphSqliteEvidenceRepository !== 'function' || typeof sqlite.createM5TypeGraphSqliteEvidenceStore !== 'function') process.exit(1);"
